chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-180 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 25-11-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w Jam Mehrab, Secretary, Market Committee, Ubauro. **** Secretary, M.C, Ubauro is present and submits that post-dated cheques dated 25.09.2025, 25.10.2025, 25.12.2025, 25.02.2026 and 25.03.2026 amounting to Rs.500,000/-, 500,000/-, 500,000/-, 20,00,000/- and 19,00,000/- respectively have already been handed over to the petitioner, and the petitioner present in Court acknowledges the same, and nothing is outstanding against Market Committee, Ubauro. Petitioner submits that post-dated cheques were issued in the account where no balance is available. Secretary, M.C, undertakes that no cheque will be dishonoured on its presentation. Under these circumstances, this petition is disposed of. However, it is made clear that if any of the cheques is dishonoured, petitioner will be at liberty to register FIR in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
